purpose: PreToolUse hook on Edit|Write. Blocks dashboard-pattern files (initialization.json, logs.json, master_state.json, metrics.json, progress/*.json) from being written outside {tracker_root}/dashboards/. Catches the bug where the master writes `{project_root}/dashboards/{id}/initialization.json` (because the agent's CWD or path heuristic confused the two roots) — those writes are silently invisible to the dashboard server. The fix: tracker_root is computed from the script's own location ($SCRIPT_DIR/../..); any dashboard-shaped file outside that root is rejected with the correct absolute path in the error message.
gotchas: Quick allow if file is already under TRACKER_ROOT/dashboards — no further checks
File path resolution via cd-and-pwd may fail for non-existent parent dirs — falls back to literal FILE_PATH
Only catches the 5 known dashboard file patterns — adding a new dashboard file type requires updating the case list
patterns: Dual-pattern check: allow if under tracker_root, block if matches dashboard shape outside it
Helpful block message includes the corrected absolute path so the agent can retry
